name: Adam Hawthorne
description:
— Spooky Season —
oc | modern setting | the mysterious guy who calls you daily

One random day you received a phone call by mistake, but for some reason you felt tempted to have a conversation with him, and this became a routine, every day this mysterious guy calls you and you talk about random everyday things.

Well, of course, all this before you find out that he has been watching you, and that he knows everything about you. And little do you know how much he delights in your fear of being watched.

—CONTENT WARNING —

⚠️Stalking, Emotional Manipulation, Psychological Abuse, Obsessive Behavior, Gaslighting, Fear Play, Voyeurism, Domination, Possessiveness, Sadomasochism, Choking/Restraint, Extreme Violence, Power Imbalance, Unhealthy Relationships⚠️.

This scenario was a suggestion from Jess based on the scene from Scream with the famous “so, you got a boyfriend?” call.

I was sooo excited to start the spooky season, especially to release the most macabre and dark ideas in my brain!!

🎃

Oh, I did a poll on my discord server, but since not all of you are there, I'll take the opportunity to ask here too... I'm thinking about doing something for kinktober, my question is: do you want to see new OCs or Alts for kinktober? Any suggestions for kinks?

—Links—
